sql.description: The SQL string of the query

time.description: Time spent executing the entire query

cpu_time.description: CPU time spent on the query

total_intermediate_rows.description: Cumulative number of intermediate rows produced by the query

total_row_groups_scanned.description: Cumulative number of row groups scanned by the query

total_row_groups_to_scan.description: Cumulative total number of row groups available to scan

total_rows_scanned.description: Cumulative number of rows scanned by the query

result_set_size.description: The size of the result set

blocked_thread_time.description: Time spent waiting for a thread to become available

peak_buffer_memory.description: Peak memory usage of the buffer manager

peak_temp_dir_size.description: Peak size of the temporary directory

total_memory_allocated.description: The total memory allocated by the buffer manager

total_bytes_read.description: The total amount of bytes read from storage

total_bytes_written.description: The total amount of bytes written to storage

attach_replay_wal_latency.description: Time spent replaying the WAL file

commit_local_storage_latency.description: Time spent committing the transaction-local storage

waiting_to_attach_latency.description: Time spent waiting to ATTACH a file

wal_replay_entry_count.description: The total number of entries to replay in the WAL

total_vacuum_time.description: Total time spent running vacuum tasks during checkpointing

write_to_wal_latency.description: Time spent writing to the WAL

cpu_time.description: CPU time spent in the operator

intermediate_rows.description: Number of intermediate rows produced by the operator

intermediate_size_bytes.description: Intermediate size in bytes produced by the operator

row_groups_scanned.description: Number of row groups scanned by the operator

rows_scanned.description: Number of rows scanned by the operator

total_row_groups_to_scan.description: Total number of row groups available for the operator to scan

total_time.description: Time spent in all optimizers combined
Time spent parsing the SQL query
Time spent generating the logical plan

binding_time.description: Time spent binding the logical plan

total_time.description: Time spent generating the physical plan

column_binding.description: Time spent binding the columns in the logical plan to physical columns

create_plan.description: Time spent creating the physical plan

resolve_types.description: Time spent resolving the types in the logical plan to physical types
